amenity_description: Individually controlled air conditioning to maintain a comfortable room temperature.
Room heating system to keep the space warm and cozy during colder seasons.
High-speed wireless internet access available in the room for browsing, work, and streaming.
Flat-screen TV with cable or satellite channels and on-demand content.
A stocked mini bar with beverages and snacks available for purchase.
Compact fridge for storing food, drinks, and personal items.
In-room coffee machine or kettle with complimentary coffee and tea supplies.
Electronic or key-access safe to store valuables securely.
Work desk with lamp and power outlets for business or study purposes.
A small lounge area or chairs for relaxing, reading, or working.
On-demand food and beverage service delivered directly to your room.
Hair dryer provided in the bathroom for personal grooming.
Shampoo, conditioner, soap, lotion, and other personal care items provided.
Comfortable bathrobe provided for guest use.
Disposable or reusable slippers for comfort and hygiene.
Standalone or combined bathtub for soaking and relaxation.
In-room iron and ironing board for garment care.
Spacious closet or wardrobe with hangers to store clothes.
Noise reduction features to ensure a quiet and restful stay.
Boil water easily for tea, coffee, or instant meals.
Small microwave for reheating food and beverages.
In-room alarm clock with optional wake-up service.
Dedicated safe to securely store laptops and electronics.
Multi-format power outlets for charging international devices.
Access to Netflix, Hulu, or other streaming platforms on the TV.
Adjustable lights or dimmers to customize room ambiance.
Direct-dial phone with voicemail for receiving messages.
Room intercom for contacting the front desk or other hotel services.
Optional in-room wireless printer for guest convenience.
Color-adjustable lights to create relaxing or romantic ambiance.
Convenient charging points for phones, tablets, and other devices.
Wireless speaker for personal music enjoyment in the room.
TV connection for streaming devices like Chromecast or Apple TV.
Complimentary snacks or fruits provided upon check-in.
Complimentary coffee, tea bags, sugar, and creamer available in-room.
Fresh bottled water replenished daily for guest convenience.
Environmentally conscious toiletries, linens, and recycling options.
Available on request for guests traveling with infants.
Additional sleeping arrangement available upon request.
Room designed for guests with mobility challenges, including wide doorways and accessible bathrooms.
Rooms designed to accommodate guests traveling with pets.
Special bedding for guests with allergies or sensitive skin.
Heavy curtains that block outside light for maximum comfort.
Outdoor balcony attached to the room, providing views and fresh air.
